name: Speculaas
recipeInstructions:
Speculaas are a traditional Dutch biscuit or cookie baked on St. Nicholas' Eve (Dec. 5).
Preheat oven to 325°F.
Mix all ingredients except almonds and candied fruit peel in a bowl until well combined.
Gradually add milk, stirring until the mixture forms a stiff paste that can be rolled out.
Roll the dough into thin sheets. Optionally, press blanched almonds and chopped candied fruit peel on top.
Cut the sheets into rectangles about 2-by-4-inches.
Transfer to a greased baking sheet.
Bake until lightly browned.
